description: The comment 'No error needed -- git worktree add supports checking out existing branches.' reads as a change-process note explaining why validation was removed, rather than describing current behavior. It should be reworded to describe what the code currently does without referencing what was removed.

The new test_worktree_with_existing_branch test does not assert that created_branch_name is None for the agent. This is an important behavioral property: when an existing branch is checked out (not created), created_branch_name must be None so that 'mngr destroy --remove-created-branch' does not delete the pre-existing branch. Without this assertion, a regression in this behavior could go undetected.
